bits.premise: Being engaged to a very short woman turns every relationship and sex detail into a height joke.

lines.text: I recently got engaged to the woman of my dreams.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Love is blind and it is also three feet six inches.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I fell in love with the midget.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I can only handle half of a woman's problems.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: When we go out on dates, I carry her in a front pack
lines.label: setup

lines.text: like a little baby kangaroo.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: We always get our 50% off discount
lines.label: tag

lines.text: and we only have short arguments.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But the best part is my dick looks huge next to a midget.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: First time I've ever been in two hands at the same time.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And I feel like a giant,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause when I'm standing up,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: give her the money shot.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She's standing up too, like she's in the shower.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: We only got one problem, Austin.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She's always trying to 69,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but she can only 34.5.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: So while she's sucking my dick,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I'm licking her kneecaps.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Don't laugh, like kneecaps is delicious.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I just put a little honey on 'em.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's my time.
lines.label: fluff
